overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking down a wealthy residential street in Los Santos during a thunderstorm at night. The character walks past ornate gates and stucco walls while sports cars drive by, eventually reaching an intersection where they are struck by a vehicle and killed.

scene_state.functional_zone: wealthy residential street with high boundary walls

events.description: sedan with headlights on approaches from distance and passes by the camera
lightning strike illuminates the night sky with bright white flash
white sports car drives past the camera from behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk next to tall stucco walls during a thunderstorm

notable_agents.action: dark sedan approaching with headlights on, passes by at moderate speed

entered.detail: decorative black wrought iron gate with intricate scroll patterns
tall beige stucco wall with brick trim running along the sidewalk
tall beige stucco wall with decorative stone pillars
ornate black metal street lamp casting warm yellow-orange light
tall palm tree silhouettes visible above the walls against dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wealthy residential street at night during a thunderstorm. An ornate metal gate and tall stucco walls line both sides of the street, illuminated by warm vintage street lamps. A sedan passes by with headlights glaring, followed by a lightning flash that briefly illuminates the palm trees overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street approaching intersection with distant city view

events.description: black sedan passes very close to the camera on the right side
multiple lightning strikes visible in the sky above the street
street opens up revealing intersection and distant skyscraper with purple lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as the neighborhood opens up to a wider intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past closely, headlights reflecting off wet pavement

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated purple and white lights visible in the distance
street opening up to intersection with visible stop sign and cross street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the residential street approaches an intersection. The left wall recedes into the distance while a modern glass skyscraper with distinctive purple lighting becomes visible ahead. Multiple cars pass by on the wet road, and lightning continues to flash across the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with hedge walls and view of downtown skyline

events.description: character turns right at the intersection corner
black sports car turning right strikes the character
character dies on impact, Wasted text appears, camera falls and tilts upward

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection before being struck by a vehicle

notable_agents.action: black sports car with gold rims turning right at intersection, collides with character

entered.detail: tall dense hedge wall with stone trim on the corner of the intersection
red octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner
low brick wall with landscaping on top at the intersection edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the intersection, revealing a hedge wall and a clearer view of the illuminated downtown skyscraper. A black sports car with gold rims turns the same corner and strikes the character, killing them instantly. The camera falls to the ground and tilts up toward the night sky as the Wasted text appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from a secluded, wealthy residential street toward a brightly lit urban intersection during a nighttime thunderstorm. It begins with a walk past ornate metal gates and tall stucco walls illuminated by warm vintage street lamps, while a passing sedan's headlights glare and lightning flashes through the palm trees. As the character approaches an intersection, the residential walls recede to reveal a modern glass skyscraper glowing with purple light in the distance across the wet road. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, opening up the view of the downtown skyline and a hedge wall before a black sports car with gold rims suddenly strikes the character. Finally, the camera falls to the ground and tilts upward toward the stormy night sky as the Wasted text appears on screen.
